heading: How we work together
subtitle: A simple, transparent process from first call to launch and beyond.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We map your current workflows and pinpoint the highest-ROI automation opportunities.

steps.title: Workflow Design
steps.description: I design the architecture, define the integrations, and share a clear scope and timeline.

steps.title: Build Automation
steps.description: I build and connect your n8n workflows, adding AI where it creates real leverage.

steps.title: Testing, Launch & Support
steps.description: We test thoroughly, launch live, and I provide ongoing monitoring and improvements.
